source.readme_summary: 60种 Bento Grid 设计风格展示; transformed into Qiaomu PPT style abstractions, not copied templates.

ppt.template_name: 健康应用风格 PPT Style Seed
best_for: 需要健康应用风格视觉语言的演讲或预览
style exploration before final deck
Bento-inspired section openers or visual summary slides
avoid_for: strict compliance decks unless simplified
dense evidence pages without a readability adaptation
deck-wide use before a four-slide preview proves legibility
keywords: 为健康和健身应用设计的界面风格
数据可视化和进度指示器

typography.display: Noto Sans CJK SC / Noto Serif CJK SC selected by style tone
typography.ppt_fallback: Microsoft YaHei / PingFang SC / Aptos / Arial
typography.headline_treatment: Use claim-first titles adapted to 健康应用风格; keep CJK multiline leading readable.

layout_rules: Use Bento-style modular grouping only when it clarifies the slide claim; avoid dashboard card soup.
Keep title, body, citations, charts, labels, and diagrams editable foreground objects.
Adapt the style to PPT reading distance; decorative texture cannot reduce contrast or legibility.
ppt.media_policy: Use 健康应用风格 as visual language. Source/user/web images remain evidence; AI images may create content-linked atmosphere or concept art only.
ppt.chart_policy: Use charts only when the slide has data. Match chart treatment to style but keep labels readable and editable.
ppt.animation_hint: Use subtle reveal or section transition only after static readability is proven.

styles.description_summary: 为健康和健身应用设计的界面风格，特点是清新色彩、数据可视化和进度指示器，使用简洁图标和鼓励性文案，创造积极、清晰且激励用户的体验。
